name: Olive
description: Growth-focused hero who boosts Town Bread Output and increases Bread Gathering Speed when included in a gathering march.

skills.name: Rain of Arrows
skills.description: Olive launches a hail of arrows, dealing Attack * 252% Area of Effect Damage around the target.

skills.name: Target Lock
skills.description: Olive paints a bullseye on a target, raising damage inflicted on the target by 30% for this attack.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Archer units.

skills.name: Green Thumb
skills.description: Increases the Town’s Mill Output by 25%.

skills.name: Forager’s Luck
skills.description: Increases Resource Gathering Speed in the Wilderness by 25%.

name: Edwin
description: Growth-focused hero who boosts Town Stone Output and increases Stone Gathering Speed when included in a gathering march.

skills.name: Shrapnel Load
skills.description: Edwin throws out a homemade explosive, dealing Attack * 196% Area of Effect Damage to the target and nearby enemies.

skills.name: Detonate
skills.description: Edwin’s explosives have a chance to stun targets.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Cavalry units.

skills.name: Demolitions Expert
skills.description: Increases the Town’s Quarry Output by 25%.

skills.name: Stone Mining
skills.description: Increases Stone Mining Speed in the Wilderness by 25%.

name: Seth
description: Growth-focused hero who boosts Town Iron Output and increases Iron Gathering Speed when included in a gathering march.

skills.name: Hammer Burn
skills.description: Seth swings his hammer forward in a devastating arc, dealing Attack * 280% damage.

skills.name: Armor Enhancement
skills.description: Seth upgrades his armor to reduce damage taken by 30%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Infantry units.

skills.name: Burnished Iron
skills.description: Increases the Town’s Iron Output by 25%.

skills.name: Craftsmanship
skills.description: Increases Iron Mining Speed in the Wilderness by 25%.

name: Forrest
description: Growth-focused hero who boosts Town Wood Output and increases Wood Gathering Speed when included in a gathering march.

skills.name: Axe Whirl
skills.description: Forrest’s axe pirouette deals damage of Attack * 110% per 0.5s to nearby enemies for 3s.

skills.name: Razor Sharp
skills.description: Forrest’s sharpened axe deals 30% more damage per second.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Infantry units.

skills.name: Woodland Inheritor
skills.description: Increases the Town’s Sawmill Output by 25%.

skills.name: Master Woodcutter
skills.description: Increases Wood Gathering Speed in the Wilderness by 25%.

name: Amane
description: Epic hero introduced in the June 26, 2025 update. Provides strong team-wide buffs and offensive abilities.

skills.name: Sakura Blossom
skills.description: Amane summons a protective enchantment, increasing all Heroes’ and Escorts’ Attack and Attack Speed for 4 seconds.

skills.name: Fire Sigil
skills.description: Amane lobs a fiery sigil at the enemy, dealing Attack * 210% damage.

skills.name: Divine Melody
skills.description: Every 3 basic attacks increase Amane’s Attack Speed by 5% until the end of the battle.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Archer units.

skills.name: Tri-Phalanx
skills.description: Amane’s formation increases all Squads’ total Attack by 25%.

skills.name: Exorcism
skills.description: Increases Infirmary Healing Speed by 50%.

name: Yeonwoo
description: Epic hero introduced with the June 26, 2025 update. Strong joiner hero for Bear Hunt due to Lethality boost. Also increases Academy Research Speed.

skills.name: Petalbloom
skills.description: Yeonwoo arcs Petalbloom outward in three waves, dealing Attack * 100%, Attack * 175%, and Attack * 210% damage respectively, with the third being area of effect damage.

skills.name: Falling Swallow
skills.description: Deals Attack * 140% damage and reduces the target’s Attack Speed by 50% for 2 seconds.

skills.name: Twin Fangs
skills.description: Increases Yeonwoo’s Attack by 24%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Archer units.

skills.name: On Guard
skills.description: Increases all Squads’ total Lethality by 25%.

skills.name: Well-Traveled
skills.description: Increases Research Speed by 15%.

name: Fahd
description: Epic hero introduced with the June 26, 2025 update. Specializes in weakening enemies and boosting allied attack and march speed.

skills.name: Sandstorm
skills.description: The blinding sandstorm reduces Enemy Squads’ Attack by 5% for 2 seconds.

skills.name: Eagle Wings
skills.description: After unleashing Sandstorm, Fahd’s eagle directs allies’ attack, increasing his and nearby friendly Squads’ Attack by 35% for 2 seconds.

skills.name: Dune General
skills.description: Fahd’s desert instincts increase his Attack Speed by 30%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Cavalry units.

skills.name: Desert Eclipse
skills.description: A rising cloud of sand reduces all Enemy Squads’ Damage Dealt by 20%.

skills.name: Pathfinder
skills.description: Increases Solo Hunting March Speed by 100%.

name: Chenko
description: Epic Cavalry hero. Top-tier joiner hero due to strong expedition skills, especially Stand of Arms for Bear Hunt.

skills.name: Burst Fire
skills.description: Unleashes a rapid barrage, dealing Attack * 75% damage to enemies in front every 0.5s for 2s.

skills.name: Defense Upgrade
skills.description: Chenko upgrades her armor, increasing Defense by 70%.

skills.name: Weapon Upgrade
skills.description: Chenko’s upgraded weapon boosts Attack by 24%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Cavalry units.

skills.name: Stand of Arms
skills.description: Increases total Squads’ Lethality by 25%.

skills.name: Shield Wall
skills.description: Reduces damage taken by 20% for all troops.

name: Gordon
description: Epic Cavalry hero mainly used as a joiner hero for Garrison due to his strong Health-boosting expedition skill.

skills.name: BBQ Feast
skills.description: Restores Health by Attack * 280% to all troops and increases Attack by 7% for all troops for 4 seconds.

skills.name: Culinary Chaos
skills.description: Reduces Gordon’s damage taken by 30%.

skills.name: Emergency Snack
skills.description: Restores Health equal to Attack * 70% every 5 seconds.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Cavalry units.

skills.name: Super Nutrients
skills.description: Increases total Squads’ Health by 25%.

skills.name: Trash Talk
skills.description: Increases total Squads’ Attack by 25%.

name: Diana
description: Epic Archer hero unlocked exclusively through the Desert Trial event. Highly valuable due to stamina‑saving expedition skills and extremely high march speed potential.

skills.name: Incendiary Arrows
skills.description: Diana fires an Incendiary Shot, dealing Attack * 290% damage to the target and Attack * 98% damage to nearby enemies.

skills.name: Sharpshooter
skills.description: Increases Attack Speed by 30%.

skills.name: Deadly Strike
skills.description: Increases Crit Rate by 20%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Archer units.

skills.name: Iron Constitution
skills.description: Reduces Governor Stamina Cost by 20%.

skills.name: Quick Paced
skills.description: Increases March Speed by 100%.

name: Howard
description: Epic Infantry hero. Provides strong defensive buffs and enemy weakening effects, making him valuable for garrison and defensive roles.

skills.name: Shielded Strike
skills.description: Howard gives an enemy a solid whack with his heavy shield, knocking the target back while dealing Attack * 280% Area of Effect damage.

skills.name: Joint Defense
skills.description: Howard leads the effort to fortify defenses, increasing Defense by 15% for all heroes.

skills.name: Shield Block
skills.description: Howard trades in his shield for an upgraded model, reducing damage taken by 30%.

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Infantry units.

skills.name: Defenders’ Edge

skills.name: Weaken
skills.description: Howard’s intimidating presence reduces total Enemy Squads’ Attack by 20%.

name: Quinn
description: Epic Archer hero unlocked during the tutorial. Additional shards can be obtained through Hero Recruitment or Intel Missions.

skills.name: Headshot
skills.description: The upgraded Crossbow deals Attack * 560% damage.

skills.name: Quick Shot
skills.description: Years of training increases Quinn’s Attack Speed by 30%.

skills.name: Natural Selection

skills.name: Expedition
skills.description: Expedition stat boosts for Archer units.

skills.name: Sixth Sense

skills.name: Precision Shot
skills.description: Quinn grants all soldiers a 50% chance of dealing 50% more damage when attacking.

name: Jabel
description: Mythic Generation 1 Cavalry hero. Easiest Mythic to unlock due to multiple acquisition paths including 7‑day sign‑in rewards and Hero Hall recruitment.

skills.name: Brave the Storm
skills.description: Deals Attack * 210% damage to the target.

skills.name: Persistence
skills.description: Increases Attack Speed by 60% when Health is below 50%.

skills.name: Expedition

skills.name: Rally Flag

skills.name: Hero’s Domain
skills.description: Grants all squads a 50% chance of dealing 50% more damage when attacking.

skills.name: Youthful Rage

skills.name: Divine Strength
